action.reasoning: Observation: 4-model ensemble got 0.8587, slightly worse than 3-model 0.8595. Adding m2 (val 0.836, non-EMA, weaker) hurt. Analysis: I should drop m2.pt from ensemble — the weak member dilutes. Try 3 stronger checkpoints: best.pt (0.849), m1.pt (0.849 EMA), m3.pt (0.844 EMA). Decision: Modify predict.py to skip m2.pt, ensemble best+m1+m3.
